abilities.name: Fast Cast
abilities.text: This model's Charge action may generate (+) actions instead of (//) actions.

abilities.name: Shapechange (White Stag)
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may replace itself with Ceddra, White Stag and heal 2.

abilities.name: U Threatening Demeanor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

actions.name: Breath of Frost
actions.effects: Deal this action's damage to a different enemy model within 2" of the target. Models damaged by this action gain a Staggered token.

triggers.name: Dismember
triggers.text: Make a Remains marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Call of the Wild
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally or friendly beast only. Move the target up to its Sp.

triggers.name: Flames of Change
triggers.text: Target discards a Mutation upgrade. Attach a Mutation upgrade to the target.

actions.name: Swallow You Whole
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Friendly only. Kill the target. This model heals X, where X is equal to the target's current health.

triggers.name: Untamable Hunger
triggers.text: Replace this model with Ceddra, White Stag.
